# Vendored SpecKit Planning Assets

These planning-related SpecKit skill definitions are vendored from:

- Repository: `https://github.com/tolulawson/speckit-agent-skills`
- Commit: `c21d8d2defd2d74670fe10fb63fc73e689a0a671`
- Retrieved: `2026-03-01`

Vendored scope in this repository:

- `speckit-constitution`
- `speckit-specify`
- `speckit-clarify`
- `speckit-plan`
- `speckit-tasks`

Rationale:

- Keep Ralph planning deterministic even when system-wide skills are not installed.
- Preserve the canonical SpecKit phase order for the planning pipeline.
- Allow in-repo testing and review of planning behavior.
